name: Dryvebox White Plains
address: Main Parking Lot, 701 Dobbs Ferry Rd, White Plains, NY 10607
about: Dryvebox White Plains is a mobile golf simulator service that delivers state-of-the-art, climate-controlled golf studios directly to events. The venue utilizes Tour-trusted TrackMan technology to provide a realistic golf experience in various formats, including mobile trailers and indoor pop-up enclosures. It is designed for a wide range of events, from corporate gatherings and private parties to brand activations, and offers an all-inclusive experience with clubs, balls, equipment, and staff operation.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology for accurate shot data and course simulation
Convenient mobile service that brings the golf experience directly to any location
All-inclusive packages with clubs, balls, and professional staff handling setup and operation

simulator_hardware.notes: Powered by TrackMan technology, used in all simulator formats

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, all clubs, balls, and equipment are provided with your booking.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state BYOB policies. It's recommended to check with the venue directly for confirmation.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a duration for 18 holes, but it mentions that you can choose the course and hole, and that the simulators can be used for practice and games.

faq.question: Is Dryvebox kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Dryvebox is kid-friendly and can accommodate children, with services available for both new golfers and experienced players.
